slice_name: Tag a time entry with a label

build_units.name: Time Logging
build_units.lld_notes: Grounded existing-code-first (BF5, cheapest-source-first): read neighbor time_logging modules + baseline-map conventions + aPRD CONVENTION_BASELINE BEFORE writing. New code matches the captured conventions, NOT canon defaults — lang Python>=3.11 (ADR-0002); layout src/freelancer_app/time_logging/*.py (one package per component); naming snake_case module file (time_entry_label.py) matching existing identity_record_store.py/oauth_callback.py idiom; lint pyproject pythonpath=['src'], no ruff/black config (so no reformat applied). Additive label feature: set_label persists the label field on the time-entry record via C1 (CT2 label extension, A14) — delegates to data_store; propagates StoreUnavailableError + ConstraintViolationError unmodified from the C1 mock (matches the existing time_logging error-handling idiom — propagate, do not catch). New namespace file ONLY; no existing time_logging baseline file reformatted/restyled/edited (BF1). Framework-agnostic plain Python at the contract layer; synchronous, no async/queue (INV6).

verification.static_trace_basis: No pytest runtime available in bench. Each obligation test traced against implementation by construction: CT2 label shape — set_label delegates the label-bearing record to mock_data_store, the persisted label field equals the submitted text; CT2 label failure store-unavailable — StoreUnavailableError propagated unmodified from the C1 mock (no catch); CT2 label failure constraint-violation — ConstraintViolationError propagated unmodified. All assertions hold by construction. Authoritative execution owed to VERIFY-OUTPUT.

checked.layout: src/freelancer_app/time_logging/*.py — additive file in the existing component package, no new top-level layout
checked.lint: no ruff/black config present — baseline files left byte-unchanged, no reformat applied
checked.naming: snake_case module file (time_entry_label.py) matching existing session_gate.py/identity_record_store.py idiom

commits.message: C4 Time Logging: time-entry label field (CT2 label extension) — additive, convention-conformant
